payload.answer: I could not save this as a durable memory because the article could not be fetched and no article content was provided. I can only note that the user attempted to remember an article URL described as useful for memory architecture, but the source content is unavailable.

entity_resolution.reason: The supplied article URL appears malformed and the mock fetch result indicates a 404 network error, so no article content was available to extract durable claims.

details: Fetch failed with mock result: 404 network error.
No article claims were extracted or stored.

repair_options: Paste the article text or a summary to remember.
